title: Privacy Policy
subtitle: Fanometrix Fan Survey Privacy Notice

sections.heading: What is Fanometrix?
body: Fanometrix is a fan intelligence platform that runs short, anonymous survey campaigns on behalf of sports clubs, competitions, brands and media publishers. Surveys are delivered as embedded units within digital media placements.
We are committed to protecting the privacy of everyone who participates in our surveys.

sections.heading: What data we collect
body: We collect only the minimum data necessary to produce meaningful fan insight:

table.d: Your answers to the multiple-choice questions
Identifies which brand or campaign the survey belongs to
The media partner where the survey was displayed
The position on the page (e.g. homepage MPU)
The football club or competition the survey relates to
Country-level location only (e.g. United Kingdom). No city, postcode, GPS or precise location data.
Mobile, tablet or desktop — derived from your browser
Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge or Other
How many seconds the survey took to complete
Date and approximate time of submission

sections.heading: What we do NOT collect
list: Names, email addresses, phone numbers or any contact information
User IDs, login credentials or account data
Precise location data — GPS, city, postcode or address. Country-level only.
IP addresses — not collected, stored or retained by Fanometrix
Cookies, advertising IDs or persistent identifiers
Fanometrix does not knowingly collect information from children under 16

sections.heading: Why we collect it
body: Survey responses are collected to produce aggregated fan insight reports for sports rights holders and their commercial partners. No individual is profiled, targeted or identified from the data we collect.
The data is anonymous — the combination of fields we collect cannot realistically be used to identify a specific person.
The information collected by Fanometrix is intentionally limited to anonymous, non-identifiable survey responses and is designed to minimise privacy risk.

sections.heading: Data storage and retention
body: Data is stored securely in a database hosted in the EU West (London) region. Data is retained for a maximum of 36 months from the date of collection, after which it is permanently and securely deleted. Access is restricted to authorised Fanometrix administrators.

sections.heading: Your rights
body: Because we do not collect any information that can identify you, we are unable to locate, modify or delete a specific individual's response. If you have a concern about data collected via a specific survey placement, please contact the publisher who displayed it.
If you have any questions about our privacy practices, please contact us directly.

contactBody: For questions about this policy, contact us at:
discrepancy: In the event of any discrepancy between translations of this Privacy Policy, the English version shall prevail.
